/opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/x86_64-pokysdk-linux/usr/bin/aarch64-poky-linux/aarch64-poky-linux-g++ --sysroot=/opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/armv8a-poky-linux -fPIC -std=c++14 -fpermissive -Wno-error=cast-function-type -D_GNU_SOURCE -O3 -Wall  -shared -Wl,-soname,libikd_tree.so -o /home/wave/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libikd_tree.so CMakeFiles/ikd_tree.dir/src/ikd_Tree.cpp.o
